name: Gmail
pass_tip: Gmail needs an App Password (Google Account → Security → 2-Step Verification → App passwords), not your normal password. Also enable IMAP in Gmail → Settings → Forwarding and POP/IMAP.

name: Outlook / Office 365
pass_tip: If your account uses 2-step verification, create an app password (account.microsoft.com → Security) and use it here.

name: Outlook.com / Hotmail
pass_tip: If 2-step verification is on, create an app password at account.microsoft.com → Security and use it here.

name: Yahoo Mail
pass_tip: Yahoo requires an app password (Account security → Generate app password), not your login password.

name: AOL Mail
pass_tip: AOL requires an app password (Account security → Generate app password).

name: iCloud Mail
pass_tip: iCloud requires an app-specific password (appleid.apple.com → Sign-In and Security → App-Specific Passwords).

name: Zoho Mail
pass_tip: If 2FA is enabled, generate an application-specific password (Zoho Account → Security → App Passwords).

name: Zoho Mail (EU)
pass_tip: If 2FA is enabled, generate an application-specific password (Zoho Account → Security → App Passwords).

name: Fastmail
pass_tip: Create an app password in Fastmail (Settings → Privacy & Security → App passwords).

name: GMX
user_tip: Enable IMAP access first: GMX webmail → Settings → POP3/IMAP.

name: Web.de
user_tip: Enable IMAP access first: Web.de webmail → Einstellungen → POP3/IMAP.

name: Yandex Mail
pass_tip: Enable IMAP in Yandex settings and use an app password if 2FA is on (Yandex ID → Security → App passwords).

name: Mail.ru
pass_tip: Mail.ru requires an app password for external clients (Security → Passwords for external applications).

name: AT&T
pass_tip: AT&T requires a secure mail key (signin.att.com → Profile → Sign-in info → Manage secure mail keys) instead of your password.
